summary.title: Redacted review bundle
summary.overview: Shows how ProofDock keeps reviewer previews useful while redacting obvious token-shaped values.

risks: The checked-in fixture contains fake secrets for demo purposes only.
ProofDock redacts generated previews and command output; do not use demo fixtures as real credentials.
nextSteps: Inspect summary.md or pr-comment.md for redacted evidence.
Replace the sample log and note with task-specific artifacts before sharing a real bundle.
